Ancient Destructor Lord.name: Ancient Destructor Lord
Ancient Destructor Lord.equipped_with: A Nekrosor Lord is equipped with: Enmitic annihilator; Hyperhpase harvester.

option_groups.header: Only one Nekrosor Lord per army.

abilities: Favoured enemy(everything), Furious Charge, Regeneration(1)
Royal Necrodermis: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).
Whip coils: Enemy models in base contact get -1 attack in close combat, to a minimum of 1. Stacks with itself.
Ancient Destructor Lord.unit_type: Jump Pack, Monstrous Creature, KEYWORD, Lord, Necron

Cryptek.name: Cryptek

option_groups.header: May be upgraded to one of the following. Each specialisation is unique per army

abilities: Command squad, Regeneration(1)
Royal Court: If an Overlord is present, up to four Crypteks can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot. If a Lord is present, up to two Crypteks can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Chronomancer: The model additionally grants +1 Initiative to itself and its attached unit.
Dynasty Scion: The model gains an improved profile (see above) and has access to Lord equipment in the Armory, instead of Cryptek.
Plasmancer: Automatic wounds caused by equipment from this model trigger on a 3+.
Psychomancer: Once per turn, an enemy unit within 18" suffers a cumulative -1 penalty to its Leadership until the next Rally phase.
Technomancer: Once per turn, one Reanimation Protocol roll for a unit within 6" is automatically successfull.
Cryptek.unit_type: Character model, Infantry, KEYWORD, Cryptek, Necron

Lord.name: Lord

option_groups.header: One Lord per army can be upgraded to an Overlord for +15 points.

abilities: Regeneration(1)
My Will Be Done: Select one <Necron> unit during your Reinforcement phase. The unit gains the "Fearless" ability until the end of the current battle round.
Overlord: An Overlord may use My Will Be Done a second time.
Royal Court: If an Overlord is present, up to four Lords can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Royal Necrodermis: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).
Lord.unit_type: Character model, Infantry, KEYWORD, Lord, Necron

Royal Warden.name: Royal Warden
Royal Warden.equipped_with: A Royal Warden is equipped with: Relic tesla carbine.

option_groups.header: May swap its Relic tesla carbine with a Relic gauss blaster for +8 points.

abilities: Command squad, Regeneration(1)

Royal Court: If an Overlord is present, up to four Royal Wardens can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot. If a Lord is present, up to two Royal Wardens can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Relentless March: The model and its attached unit may shoot “Rapid fire” weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" order and ignores the to hit penalty for "Advance" orders with "Assault" weapons.

Skorpekh Lord.name: Skorpekh Lord
Skorpekh Lord.equipped_with: A Skorpekh Lord is equipped with: Enmitic annihilator; Hyperhpase harvester.
abilities: Favoured enemy(everything), Furious Charge, Move through cover, Regeneration(1)
Royal Necrodermis: Reduces AP of enemy attacks by -1 (to a minimum of 0).
Skorpekh Lord.unit_type: Character model, Monstrous Creature, KEYWORD, Lord, Necron

Flayed Ones.name: Flayed Ones
Flayed Ones.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Flayer claws.
abilities: Deep strike, Infiltrator, Reanimation Protocols, Terrifying(-1)

Immortals.name: Immortals
Immortals.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Tesla carbine.

option_groups.header: The unit can swap their Tesla carbines
The unit can be equipped with

abilities: Reanimation Protocols

Warriors.name: Warriors
Warriors.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Gauss flayer.

option_groups.header: The unit can swap their Gauss flayers
The unit can be equipped with

abilities: Reanimation Protocols

C'tan Shard.name: C'tan Shard
C'tan Shard.equipped_with: A C'tan Shard is equipped with: C'tan close combat weapon.

option_groups.header: An army can contain only one C'tan Shard.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fearless, Regeneration(1), Terrifying(-1)
Necrodermis: The model has a 4+ invulnerability save. If it loses its last wound, it explodes like a vehicle.
Powers of the C'tan: The model can manifest 2 powers per turn automatically. It knows all the powers from the list of C'tan powers. Each C'tan can only use each power once per battle round.

C'tan Shard of the Deceiver.name: C'tan Shard of the Deceiver
C'tan Shard of the Deceiver.equipped_with: A Deceiver is equipped with: Golden Fists.

option_groups.header: An army can contain only one C'tan Shard.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Deflect, Fearless, Hit & Run, Parry, Regeneration(1), Terrifying(-1)

Great Illusion: At the beginning of the first battle round, the Deceiver can remove up to three units from his own army from the field and relocate them within his own deployment zone. Alternatively, each unit can also be placed in reserve.
Necrodermis: The model has a 4+ invulnerability save. If it loses its last wound, it explodes like a vehicle.
Powers of the C'tan: The model can manifest 2 powers per turn automatically. It knows all the powers from the list of C'tan powers. Each C'tan can only use each power once per battle round.

C'tan Shard of the Dragon.name: C'tan Shard of the Dragon
C'tan Shard of the Dragon.equipped_with: A Dragon is equipped with: Spear of the Dragon.

option_groups.header: An army can contain only one C'tan Shard.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fearless, Regeneration(1), Terrifying(-1)
Necrodermis: The model has a 4+ invulnerability save. If it loses its last wound, it explodes like a vehicle.
Powers of the C'tan: The model can manifest 2 powers per turn automatically. It knows all the powers from the list of C'tan powers. Each C'tan can only use each power once per battle round.

C'tan Shard of the Nightbringer.name: C'tan Shard of the Nightbringer
C'tan Shard of the Nightbringer.equipped_with: A Nightbringer is equipped with: Arc lightning; Scythe of the Nightbringer.

option_groups.header: An army can contain only one C'tan Shard.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fearless, Regeneration(1), Terrifying(-1)
Necrodermis: The model has a 4+ invulnerability save. If it loses its last wound, it explodes like a vehicle.
Powers of the C'tan: The model can manifest 2 powers per turn automatically. It knows all the powers from the list of C'tan powers. Each C'tan can only use each power once per battle round.

Canoptek Reanimator.name: Canoptek Reanimator
Canoptek Reanimator.equipped_with: A Reanimator is a single model and equipped with: Atomiser beam; Reanimator claws.
abilities: Squadron
Containment field: The model has a 5+ invulnerability save.
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Nanoscarab reanimator beam: Instead of using the Atomiser beam, you may target a friendly <Necron> unit within 12". The target immediately succeeds at 2 Reanimation Protocol rolls.

Canoptek Spyders.name: Canoptek Spyders
Canoptek Spyders.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Automaton claws.

option_groups.header: Any number of models can each be equipped with: +5 points Dark prison, +5 points Fabricator claw array, +27 points two Particle beamers.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Squadron
Dark prison: The model can dispel 1 psychic power per battle round.

Fabricator claw array: At the end of its movement, the model can attempt to repair a vehicle within 3". On a 4+, an "Immobilized" or "Weapon Destroyed" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored.

Scarab hive: At the end of its movement, the model can repair up to 3 points of damage to a unit of Canoptek Scarabs within 3". Slain models can be revived with this ability if at least a single Canoptek Scarab model from its unit is still alive.

Cryptothralls.name: Cryptothralls
Cryptothralls.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Scouring eye; Scythed limbs.

option_groups.header: For every Cryptek you may select a unit of Technothralls that take up no Elite-slot.

abilities: Bodyguard, Regeneration(1)
Servant: The unit cannot contest or hold mission objectives.
Systematic Vigour: If a Cryptek is attached to the unit, each Technothrall gains a bonus of +1 on to hit rolls. Technothralls do not prevent a Cryptek from joining another unit.

Deathmarks.name: Deathmarks
Deathmarks.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Synaptic disintegrator.
abilities: Deep strike, Reanimation Protocols

Aetheric Interception: Deathmarks roll two dice less for scatter when deep striking. Additionally, once an enemy unit emerges from reserve, a Deathmark unit that has not yet used its order this round of combat may perform an intercept. The Deathmark unit is removed from the field or from reserves and immediately deployed within 18" of the enemy reserve unit. The Deathmarks can then fire at that unit as if it had been given the "Move & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

Hexmark Destroyer.name: Hexmark Destroyer
Hexmark Destroyer.equipped_with: A Hexmark Destroyer is equipped with: Enmitic disintegrator pistol.
abilities: Command squad, Deep strike, Regeneration(1)
Royal Assassin: For each Lord or Skorpekh Lord, a Hexmark Destructor can be chosen that does not occupy an elite slot.

Lychguard.name: Lychguard
Lychguard.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Dispersion shield and Hyperphase sword.

option_groups.header: Any model can swap its Dispersion shield and Hyperphase sword
For every HQ unit, you may pick one Lychguard unit.

abilities: Bodyguard, Command squad, Reanimation Protocols
Dispersion shield: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save and the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".
Varguard: If a single Lychguard model is selected, it becomes a character model.

Pariahs.name: Pariahs
Pariahs.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Void scythe with inbuilt Gauss caster.
abilities: Psionic Abomination: The unit can never be targeted by psychic powers. Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty on any roll to manifest and dispel psychic powers. Enemy units within 12" suffer a -1 penalty to their Leadership. All ranged and melee attacks made by the unit against a target within 6" gain "Shield breaker(-1)".

Plasmacyte.name: Plasmacyte
Plasmacyte.equipped_with: A Plasmacyte is a character model and equipped with: -.

option_groups.header: For each started 500 points game size, one Plasmacyte may be taken without using up an Elite slot.

abilities: Command squad

Infused Madness: At the start of any activation, roll 1D6 for each model in the unit that the Plasmacyte has joined. On each 1 or 2, the unit suffers one Mortal Wound. Models killed by this ability are removed from play and Reanimation Protocols cannot be used. All surviving models gain the special rules "Decimate", "Lance(1)" and "Quick(1)" for melee attacks until the start of their next activation. A Plasmacyte receives the same movement and deployment rules as the unit it joins. Can only affect <Necron> units. Each Plasmacyte may use this ability once per game.
Servant: The unit cannot contest or hold mission objectives.

Skorpekh Destroyers.name: Skorpekh Destroyers
Skorpekh Destroyers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Hyperphase threshers.

option_groups.header: For every 3 Destroyers, one Destroyer may swap their Hyperphase threshers

abilities: Massive(1), Move through cover, Reanimation Protocols

Triarch Stalker.name: Triarch Stalker
Triarch Stalker.equipped_with: A Stalker is a single model and equipped with: Particle shredder.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Particle shredder
Can be equipped with

abilities: Move through cover, Squadron
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Quantum shielding: The model increases its armor values by +2 on each side, up to a maximum of 14. If it suffers a penetrating hit, it loses this bonus until the next Reinforcement phase.
Targeting relay: After scoring a hit on an enemy unit, the next friendly unit firing on the same target can re-roll one failed to hit and wound roll.
Reinforced forelimbs: The model gains WS 3+ and +2 A.

Canoptek Scarabs.name: Canoptek Scarabs
Canoptek Scarabs.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Feeder mandibles.

option_groups.header: The unit can take one upgrade

abilities: Mindless, Swarm, Use cover

Explosion: Scarab swarms may explode at the end of their movement. For each base remaining, an enemy unit within 3" suffers a hit with S: 5 AP: 0 D: 1; Explosive. All Scarab swarms in the unit are removed after the explosion.
Bloodswarm Scarabs: Flayed Ones that deep strike within 6" do not scatter.
Flensing Scarabs: Melee attacks gain "Poison(2+)".
Frenzied Scarabs: The model gains +1 Initiative.

Canoptek Wraiths.name: Canoptek Wraiths
Canoptek Wraiths.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Vicious claws.

option_groups.header: Any model can each be equipped with one of the following
All models can additionally be equipped with

abilities: Whip coils: Enemy models in base contact get -1 attack in close combat, to a minimum of 1. Stacks with itself.
Wraith form: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.
Canoptek Wraiths.unit_type: Jet bike, Monstrous Infantry, KEYWORD, Canoptek

Ophydian Destroyers.name: Ophydian Destroyers
Ophydian Destroyers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Hyperphase threshers.

option_groups.header: For every 3 Destroyers, one Destroyer may swap their Hyperphase threshers

abilities: Infiltrator, Massive(1), Parry, Reanimation Protocols

Tunneling Horrors: Once per game, at the start of their activation, the unit may use a Stand & Shoot order to be immediately re-deployed anywhere on the battlefield. They must keep a minimum distance of 6" to enemy models.

Tomb Blades.name: Tomb Blades
Tomb Blades.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Twin tesla carbine.

option_groups.header: The unit can choose one of the following upgrades
The unit can swap its Twin tesla carbines

abilities: Massive(2), Reanimation Protocols
Nebuloscope: Ranged attacks gain "Seeking".
Shadowloom and shieldvanes: The model gains a 3+ armor save and a  5+ invulnerability save.

Triarch Praetorians.name: Triarch Praetorians
Triarch Praetorians.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Particle caster; Voidblade.

option_groups.header: Any model can swap its Particle casters and Voidblades

abilities: Reanimation Protocols

Annihilation Barge.name: Annihilation Barge
Annihilation Barge.equipped_with: A Annihilation Barge is a single model and equipped with: Tesla cannon, Twin tesla destructor.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Tesla cannon

abilities: Anti-Grav
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Quantum shielding: The model increases its armor values by +2 on each side, up to a maximum of 14. If it suffers a penetrating hit, it loses this bonus until the next Reinforcement phase.

Canoptek Doomstalker.name: Canoptek Doomstalker
Canoptek Doomstalker.equipped_with: A Doomstalker is a single model and equipped with: Doomsday blaster; Twin gauss flayer.
abilities: Containment field: The model has a 5+ invulnerability save.
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Sentinel construct: If a friendly unit is charged within 12", the Dominator Strider can also fire Overwatch.

Doomsday Ark.name: Doomsday Ark
Doomsday Ark.equipped_with: A Doomsday Ark is a single model and equipped with: Doomsday cannon; two Gauss flayer arrays.
abilities: Anti-Grav
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Power surge: The Doomsday cannon's "High energy" profile may only be used with a "Stand & Shoot" command.
Quantum shielding: The model increases its armor values by +2 on each side, up to a maximum of 14. If it suffers a penetrating hit, it loses this bonus until the next Reinforcement phase.

Lokhust Destroyers.name: Lokhust Destroyers
Lokhust Destroyers.equipped_with: Every Destroyer is equipped with: Gauss cannon.

option_groups.header: Any Destroyer can swap their Gaus cannon

abilities: Reanimation Protocols

Monolith.name: Monolith
Monolith.equipped_with: A Monolith is a single model and equipped with: Four Gauss flux arcs; Teleport homer; Particle whip.

option_groups.header: Can replace the four Gauss flux arcs

abilities: Anti-Grav, Deep strike
Gate of Eternity: Instead of using its particle whip, a Monolith can teleport a friendly <Necron> unit to it. Remove the target unit from the battlefield and redeploy it within 3" of the Monolith.
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.

Lumbering: The model can never move more than 6". If it arrives via Deep strike from reserve and would land on top of an enemy unit, move all models as little as possible to make room for the Monolith.

Ghost Ark.name: Ghost Ark
Ghost Ark.equipped_with: A Ghost Ark is a single model and equipped with: Two Gauss flayer arrays.
abilities: Anti-Grav
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Quantum shielding: The model increases its armor values by +2 on each side, up to a maximum of 14. If it suffers a penetrating hit, it loses this bonus until the next Reinforcement phase.

Repair Barge: During the Reinforcement Phase, you may target up to three units that are either within 3" of it or are on board as passengers. Each unit automatically succeeds at 1 Reanimation Protocol roll. The same unit can be targeted multiple times.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 models.

Catacomb Command Barge.name: Catacomb Command Barge
Catacomb Command Barge.equipped_with: A Catacomb Command Barge is a single model and equipped with: Tesla cannon.

option_groups.header: Can only be taken by an Overlord. The Overlord must start the game embarked on the Command Barge.
Can replace the Tesla cannon

abilities: Anti-Grav

Chariot: The Overlord is transported by the Catacomb Command Barge (CCB) and can leave it at any time. No other model may be transported by the CCB. The Overlord can fight normally in melee while being embarked in the CCB.
Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.
Quantum shielding: The model increases its armor values by +2 on each side, up to a maximum of 14. If it suffers a penetrating hit, it loses this bonus until the next Reinforcement phase.

Convergence of Dominion.name: Convergence of Dominion
Convergence of Dominion.equipped_with: A Starstele is a single model and equipped with: -.
abilities: Squadron

Activation: All Starsteles start the game deactivated. They can be activated by holding them like a mission objective at the end of the battle round. If an active Starstele is hold like a mission objective, it may instead activate an inactive one.

Buried in the earth: After all units (including infiltrators) have been set up, deploy all Starsteles from your army. Set them up via Deep strike rules outside the enemies deployment zone. The unit always scatters, even if a "hit" is rolled for the scatter die (follow the small arrow on it for direction) and can never stray closer than 1" to another unit, terrain, the enemies deployment zone or the edge of the field. Reduce the deviation only enough to place the model.

Dolmen gate network: All of your active Startsteles are connected and act like a transport vehicle (with the same restrictions in regards to which passengers may use it). This means a unit may embark in one active Starstele and disembark in another the next turn. Each Starstele may only be used once per battle round to either have a unit embark on it, or disembark from it. The Starstele always counts as having moved 6". Units arriving from reserves may exit from a Starstele instead of other deployment methods, if they could embark on it in the first place.
Inactive: The model may only be targeted by the enemy after it has been activated.
Mark of Dominion: Enemy models within 12" of an inactive Starstele receive a -1 penalty to manifest a psychic power. If the Starstele is active, the penalty increases to -2.
Unmanned: A Starstele can't contest or capture mission objectives.

Doom Scythe.name: Doom Scythe
Doom Scythe.equipped_with: A Doom Scythe is a single model and equipped with: Heavy death ray; Twin tesla destructor.
abilities: Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.

Night Scythe.name: Night Scythe
Night Scythe.equipped_with: A Night Scythe is a single model and equipped with: Twin tesla destructor.
abilities: Living metal: The model repairs one vehicle damage at the start of each Reinforcement phase in any order.

Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 models. If the model is destroyed, passengers do not suffer damage, but are placed in reserve. They will automatically appear via Deep strike the next time they activate. Passengers may disembark even if the model is not in hover mode.

equipment.name: Atomic Energy Manipulator
equipment.desc:
Once per game, the model can boost a friendly infantry unit within 3" range. Roll 1D3: 
1 - The unit gains +1 Strength. 
2 - The unit gains +1 Toughness. 
3 - The unit gets +1 BS and +1 WS. 
Character models cannot be upgraded. Unique.

equipment.name: Canoptek Cloak
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Jump pack" special rule. At the end of its activation, it can heal a friendly Canoptek unit within 6" for 1 Wound, 1 permanent vehicle damage or 1 Hull point.

equipment.name: Canoptek Control Node
equipment.desc: At the start of the activation, pick a single friendly <Canoptek> unit within 12". It gets +1 to hit rolls until the end of its activation.

equipment.name: Chronometron
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain a 6+ invulnerability save against ranged attacks. In addition, the model and an attached unit gain a +3 bonus for pursuit rolls.

equipment.name: Countertemporal Nanomines
equipment.desc: Once per battle, this unit can place Countertemporal nanomine while moving. This must be placed within 1" of the unit and more than 3" away from enemy units. The first enemy unit that comes within 3" of the nanomine suffers 1D3+1 wounds with Strength: 4, AP: -4, D: 1. Vehicles suffer 1D3 glancing hits.

equipment.name: Destroyer body
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound and the ability "Jet bike". Only for Infantry.

equipment.name: Empyric Overcharger
equipment.desc: Psykers within 18" suffer a "Perils of the Warp" attack on each double when trying to manifest a psychic power. Unique.

equipment.name: Gaze of the flame
equipment.desc: Enemy units gain no bonus attack when charging and suffer a -1 penalty to Leadership while in melee.

equipment.name: Grand strategist
equipment.desc: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, the Lord may remove and redeploy one of his units. Unique.

equipment.name: Harbinger of Despair
equipment.desc: Pick an enemy unit within 18" and roll 3D6 during your activation. If your result is higher than the target's Leadership value, the target gains a Battleshock token.

equipment.name: Harbinger of Destruction
equipment.desc: Roll 5D6 during your activation. For every 4+ an enemy unit within 24" suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:-1 Dmg:1, Seeking.

equipment.name: Illuminor
equipment.desc: The model's Rites of Reanimation ability has no range limit anymore. Unique.

equipment.name: Lightning field
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

equipment.name: Living Lightning
equipment.desc: Roll 1D6 for every enemy model in the same close combat with this model. On a 4+ it suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:-1 D:1.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon separately.

equipment.name: Mindshackel Scarab
equipment.desc: Randomly choose an enemy model in base contact. If it fails a Leadership test with 2D6, it attacks its own unit. Does not work with units consisting of a single model (like characters). Ammo(1).

equipment.name: Nightmare Shroud
equipment.desc: Instead of firing a weapon, the Nightmare shroud can be used. All enemy units within a 12" radius must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty or gain a Battleshock token. Can't be used during Defensive fire. Ammo(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Nullstone field generator
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Aegis(4+)" ability.

equipment.name: Orb of Reanimation
equipment.desc: Can be used during the Reinforcement phase to automatically succeed on 3 Reanimation Protocol rolls. Ammo(1), Unique.

equipment.name: Phase adjuster
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Phase shifter
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Phylactery
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the Lord is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Sempiternal weave
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save.

equipment.name: Shadow ankh
equipment.desc: The model may attempt to deny one psychic power per battle round and receives a +1 bonus to the roll.

equipment.name: Skorpekh body
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Initiative, +1 Wound and the ability "Move through cover". Only for Infantry.

equipment.name: Solar impulse
equipment.desc: During the model's activation, the solar impulse can be used once to give all units on the table a -1 hit penalty until the end of the battle round. Unique.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Tesseract labyrinth
equipment.desc: At the start of your activation, pick a wounded enemy model in base contact. It must pass a Strength test or is immediately removed. One use only.

equipment.name: Timesplinter mantle
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Tomb world relic
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Translocation shroud
equipment.desc: The model gains "Anti-Grav" and always advances 6" when using an "Advance" order without rolling for it.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Veil of darkness
equipment.desc: The Lord can use a "Stand & Shoot" order to immediately redeploy himself and an attached unit using the deep strike rules. Additionally, the model and its attached unit gain the "Deep strike" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deep strike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Bloodshroud
equipment.desc: During its activation, the model inflicts 1 Mortal Wound on a 3+ against all enemy units within 3". Novokh only.

equipment.name: Dominance Weapon
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Decimate" ability with all melee attacks. Mephrit only.

equipment.name: Domination Staff
equipment.desc: Select one enemy model in direct base contact. The model suffers a -2 penalty to its Initiative for the remaining battleround. Szarekhan only.

equipment.name: Starfire Mantle
equipment.desc: When the model moves over an enemy unit, it inflicts 1 Mortal Wound. Nephrekh only.

equipment.name: Stormshroud
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Sautekh only.

equipment.name: Yth Engrams
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Nihilakh only.

archetypes.name: Canoptek Court
archetypes.desc:
- Can only select Crypteks as HQ units.
- Up to two Crypteks may be taken for every HQ slot.
- <Canoptek> units gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

archetypes.name: Destroyer Cult
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to the following units only, regardless of other traits:
- Crypteks with Skorpekh body, Lords with Destroyer bodies, Skorpekh Lords
- Flayed Ones
- Canoptek Reanimators, Canoptek Spyders, C'tan Shards (any), Plasmacytes, Skorpekh Destroyers
- Canoptek Scarabs, Canoptek Wraiths, Ophydian Destroyers
- Canoptek Doomstalkers, Lokhust Destroyers
- Skorpekh Destroyers can be taken as Troops.

archetypes.name: Obeisance Phalanx
archetypes.desc:
- A Lord or Overlord must be taken as an HQ selection.
- Lychguard and Triarch Praetorians can be taken as Troops.
- No other Troop units may be selected.

archetypes.name: Yngir
archetypes.desc:
- One C'tan shard (any kind) counts as an HQ selection.
- The model gains +1 Strength, +1 Toughness, +1 Initiative, +1 Attacks and a 2+ armor save.
- The range for each C'tan power is increased by 6" and it knows the "Time's Arrow" power. 
- It costs an additional +85 points.
- Pariahs can be taken as Troops.

legacies.name: Channeling Solar Energies
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Nephrekh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Extermination of all Life
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Szarekhan dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Industrial Slaughter
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Novokh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Secure Borders
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Nihilakh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: Starkillers
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Mephrit dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

legacies.name: The Lord of the Storm
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Sautekh dynasty in the Dynasty Armory.

traits.name: Arise against Interlopers
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Eternal Conquerors
traits.desc: The unit prevents 1 RPoint from being lost for itself and gains 1 temporary RPoint each Reinforcement phase, if it is within 6" of an objective marker. Only for <Necron> units.

traits.name: Immovable Phalanx
traits.desc: If the unit uses Stand & Shoot, it gains a +1 bonus to armor saves until its next activation. Can't be combined with "Merciless hunters".

traits.name: Interplanetary Invasors
traits.desc: Vehicle units can fire all weapons, if they move up to 12". Only for vehicles.

traits.name: Isolationists
traits.desc: The unit's "Rapid Fire" weapons gain +1 Strength when being resolved against targets that are within half weapon range.

traits.name: Masters of the Martial
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one hit roll per activation.

traits.name: Merciless Hunters
traits.desc: The unit can fire "Rapid Fire" weapons twice at full range with a "Stand & Shoot" order. Can't be combined with "Immovable phalanx".

traits.name: RAD-wreathed
traits.desc: Enemy units within 3" of the unit suffer a -1 penalty to their Toughness.

traits.name: Relentless Expansionism
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Vanguard" ability . Can't be combined with "Translocation beams".

traits.name: Solar Fury
traits.desc: The unit's weapons increase their range by 3".

traits.name: Superior Artisans
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: The unmerciful Horde
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll failed Leadership tests.

traits.name: Translocation Beams
traits.desc: The unit automatically advances 6" instead of rolling for it, ignoring terrain. Can't be combined with "Relentless expansionism".

traits.name: Vassal Dynasty
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Vengeful Stars
traits.desc: The unit's ranged attacks gain a -1 AP bonus when being resolved against targets that are within half weapon range.

traits.name: Warrior Nobles
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one (additional) hit and one (additional) wound roll per activation. Only for HQ units.
